languages.text: "Священный знак отличия, которым так гордятся {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}, сотворен по очень примитивным технологиям. Словно хрупкость и недолговечность вашего вида отражается и на вашей культуре". {n}Ирлиэт делает несколько легких шагов: бумага под ее ногами практически не мнется.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Священный знак отличия, которым так гордятся {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}, сотворен по очень примитивным технологиям. Словно хрупкость и недолговечность вашего вида отражается и на вашей культуре". {n}Ирлиэт делает несколько легких шагов: бумага под ее ногами практически не мнется.{/n}
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

languages.text: "The sacred symbol of which the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Священный знак отличия, которым так гордятся {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}, сотворен по очень примитивным технологиям. "The sacred symbol of which the mon-keigh are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}

languages.text: 「モンクイが誇りに思っている聖なるシンボルは、非常に原始的な技術で造られている。あなたの種族の脆さと儚さが、文化にも反映されているようだ」{n}イルリエットは軽やかな足取りで数歩進み、足元を覆う紙にわずかなしわを刻む。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The sacred symbol of which the mon-keigh are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「モンクイが誇りに思っている聖なるシンボルは、非常に原始的な技術で造られている。あなたの種族の脆さと儚さが、文化にも反映されているようだ。」{n}イルリエットは軽やかな足取りで数歩進み、足元を覆う紙にわずかなしわを刻む。{/n}

languages.text: «El símbolo sagrado del que tanto os enorgullecéis los {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} emplea tecnología muy primitiva. Es como si la fragilidad y la naturaleza efímera de vuestra especie se reflejara también en tu vuestra cultura». {n}Yrliet da unos pocos pasos ligeros, sin apenas arrugar el papel que pisa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The sacred symbol of which the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «El símbolo sagrado del que tanto os enorgullecéis los {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} emplea tecnología muy primitiva. Es como si la fragilidad y la naturaleza efímera de vuestra especie se reflejara también en tu vuestra cultura». {n}Yrliet da unos pocos pasos ligeros, sin apenas arrugar el papel que pisa.{/n}

languages.text: "Das heilige Symbol, auf das die {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g} so stolz sind, wurde mit einer ausgesprochen primitiven Technologie geformt. Es scheint, als würde sich die Zerbrechlichkeit und Flüchtigkeit Eurer Spezies auch in Eurer Kultur widerspiegeln." {n}Yrliet macht einige federleichte Schritte, die das Papier unter ihren Füßen kaum zu berühren scheinen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The sacred symbol of which the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das heilige Symbol, auf das die {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g} so stolz sind, wurde mit einer ausgesprochen primitiven Technologie geformt. Es scheint, als würde sich die Zerbrechlichkeit und Flüchtigkeit Eurer Spezies auch in Eurer Kultur widerspiegeln." {n}Yrliet macht einige federleichte Schritte, die das Papier unter ihren Füßen kaum zu berühren scheinen.{/n}

languages.text: « Le symbole sacré qui fait la fierté des {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} est conçu dans une technologie bien primitive. C'est comme si la fragilité et le caractère éphémère de votre espèce se reflétaient également dans votre culture. » {n}Yrliet effectue quelques enjambées souples, n'effleurant qu'à peine le papier qui s'étend sous ses pieds.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The sacred symbol of which the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Le symbole sacré qui fait la fierté des {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} est conçu dans une technologie bien primitive. C'est comme si la fragilité et le caractère éphémère de votre espèce se reflétaient également dans votre culture. » {n}Yrliet effectue quelques enjambées souples, n'effleurant qu'à peine le papier qui s'étend sous ses pieds.{/n}

languages.text: “{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}引以为傲的神圣象征，制作技术却极其原始。你们种族的脆弱与转瞬即逝，似乎在你们的文化中也得到了印证。”{n}伊莉耶特迈出轻如羽毛的步伐，几乎没有在脚下的纸张上留下任何痕迹。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The sacred symbol of which the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}引以为傲的神圣象征，制作技术却极其原始。你们种族的脆弱与转瞬即逝，似乎在你们的文化中也得到了印证。”{n}伊莉耶特迈出轻如羽毛的步伐，几乎没有在脚下的纸张上留下任何痕迹。{/n}

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keighlerin{/g} bu kadar gurur duyduğu kutsal sembol, çok ilkel bir teknolojiyle işlenmiş. Sanki türünüzün kırılganlığı ve gelip geçiciliği, kültürünüze de yansımış gibi." {n}Yrliet, ayaklarının altındaki kâğıdı neredeyse hiç buruşturmadan tüy kadar hafif birkaç adım atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The sacred symbol of which the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} are so proud is wrought with very primitive technology. It is as if the fragility and ephemerality of your species is reflected in your culture as well." {n}Yrliet takes a few feather-light steps, scarcely creasing the paper beneath her feet.{/n}
